passiveAbilities.name: Feeble
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -2. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

activeAbilities.name: Trickster
activeAbilities.description: When this model successfully bluffs, after resolving the effect you may reveal the bluff and gain +3 energy

arcaneAbilities.name: Dizzy Spell
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target loses one Active Ability of your choice until end of turn.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 1 Wd.

arcaneAbilities.name: Fizzle-Pop
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Magical Dmg then is moved 1” directly away.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Can’t Hit Me!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Your opponent’s attack deals W damage to you this round.
